name: Librobäck
description: =Allmänt= Ett par block med några få problem, utvecklat först av F Malmros. =Vägbeskrivning= V 272 -> Gysinge. Eft. Industriomr. Librobäck, typ vid Hässelby o Hovlösa ta v. till grusparkering omgiven av björkar. Följ stigen v. om skogspartiet tills blocken syns. =Problem=

routes.name: Gesundheit
routes.description: Första blockets nordsida. ss i undercling.

description.text: =General= A couple of boulders with a handful of problems, first developed by F Malmros. =Directions= Take road 272 towards Gysinge. After the Librobäck industrial estate, around Hässelby and Hovlösa, turn left into a gravel car park surrounded by birch trees. Follow the path to the left of the wooded area until the boulders come into view. =Problems=
North face of the first boulder. Sit start on an undercling.
